source: But the crucial question is not what technology can enable us to do , but what sort of person -- or god -- we will be . But most of us hold out the hope that we can choose not to follow a particular path , whether we be wielding a flint axe or a nuclear bomb . The technology changes , but do we have control of ourselves sufficiently , and sufficient wisdom , to not allow the additional power provided by more advanced technology to corrupt us , as we use it to give expression to our deep-seated hostilities .

source: Anthony Brown ' 92 , the lieutenant governor of Maryland , recalls that HLS in the early 1990s was a place of turbulence with student sit-ins and rallies protesting the lack of diversity among HLS faculty . While Obama supported the students , and gave a now famous speech at a rally in 1990 , " Barack always had an insightful , reasoned kind of approach and advice , " says Brown . source: RIANZ , New Zealand 's answer to the RIAA , have withdrawn their case against an individual they said should have been punished under the country 's " 3 strikes " anti-filesharing regime . source: By now the case was drawing international attention . Christian groups began to protest and Pope Benedict XVI appealed for clemency , complaining that Christians in Pakistan are " often victims of violence and discrimination . " Other minority groups in Pakistan began calling for the repeal of the blasphemy law , saying it was used to persecute all minorities . The execution was postponed . Then in mid-November , Salman Taseer , the governor of Punjab and apparently a decent man , called for issuing a pardon and said that blasphemy should not be punishable by death . source: Just observe two children : one who loves to read and one who does not . This is my family , for the record . For the lover of books , reading is an escape and for her it is sweet joy without a shred of work in it . For the daughter who does not enjoy it , every word is scraped preciously and piled up as work done with much effort .

source: Banding Together In the face of unfathomable destruction , loss of life , and disrupted families , residents have banded together . I 've witnessed countless acts of kindness ; stores are creating free charging stations , strangers are offering rides uptown , there 's free coffee , friends have offered couches to sleep on , and companies have put work in the backseat to ensure employees safety and well-being . It is instances like this that put life into perspective and make the things that we usually get hung up on seem trivial .
domestication: 在面对无法想象的毁灭、生命损失和家庭破裂的情况下，当地居民团结起来互相帮助。我亲眼见证了无数好人好事：商店开设免费充电站，陌生人提供免费的交通服务，还有免费的咖啡，朋友们主动提供沙发让受灾者睡觉，公司也把工作放在次要位置，确保员工的安全和健康。这样的时刻让我们看清了真正重要的事情，让平时那些令我们烦恼的事变得微不足道。

source: I mostly pick on Jeff , the strong , fast , young one . He started his Manchester streak at 13 , and used to play fair . When he began his work career in California , he even took red-eye flights back home to the East Coast at Thanksgiving . For this , I gave him his due . Then he turned unethical and moved to a Connecticut town just up the road from Manchester . This is not fair play , and I am still plotting my revenge . For now , I intend to taunt him by maintaining my 29-year gap . The way I see it , if my brain sends out a strong enough signal , the legs will follow .
domestication: 我通常喜欢拿杰夫开玩笑，这个年轻有为的家伙。十三岁时，他就开始了在曼彻斯特的连续不间断的参加某项活动，并且一直很讲究公平。当他在加州开始工作时，甚至会在感恩节的时候乘坐红眼航班回到东海岸的家中。对此，我还是给予了他应有的肯定。但是后来，他变得不再讲究公平，搬到了距离曼彻斯特只有几条街远的康涅狄格州的一个小镇。这可不算是光明正大，我现在还在策划怎么报复他。暂时来说，我打算通过保持我二十九年的记录来嘲讽他。我认为，如果我的大脑发出足够强的信号，我的腿自然就会跟上。

source: I will be the first to say that I 'm usually skeptical about an expansion pack , and find a hard time paying for something that I feel is n't my thing . You have to keep in mind a saying that has been around for a very long time , " Do n't knock it ' til you try it " . Sure , a certain expansion pack might not seem all that useful based on the way that you play your game , but keep in mind that expansion packs comes with brand new interactions , furniture , clothes , and things to explore . I am a Cat Woman . My self-appointed mission in life is to save the feline world ! To accomplish this mission , I get cats fixed . Perhaps my mission might be slightly delusional . This blog is a mishmash of wishful thinking , rants , experiences as I remember them and of course , cat stories and cat photos . I love cats .  Sunday , November 25 , 2012  Photos on Dreary Gray Oregon Sunday
我是个猫迷，自封的任务就是拯救猫界！为了实现这个崇高的目标，我帮猫做绝育手术。虽然我的使命可能有点异想天开，但我就是忍不住要去做。这博客里满是我的胡思乱想、牢骚、记忆碎片，以及猫的故事和照片。因为，我就是爱猫！在2012年11月25日那个灰蒙蒙的俄勒冈州星期日，我拍下了一些照片……

source: I get that other people have other points of view . Abortion is a tough subject . Rape should not be . And as a political matter this is a no brainer . As passionately as the Akin fans feel about their position they must realize that it is one that is only shared by 20% of the country . That 's Ron Paul territory . That 's up there with Newt wanting to colonize the moon . The GOP ca n't support every extremist position that someone holds . Akin has to go and he has to go right now .
domestication: 每个人都有自己的看法，这是可以理解的。堕胎是一个很敏感的话题，但强奸绝对不应该被容忍。而从政治角度来说，这件事情已经没有什么好商量的了。阿金的粉丝们可能非常热情地拥护他的立场，但是他们也必须意识到，他们的观点只代表了全国20%的人。这就像罗恩·保罗的支持者一样，或者金里奇想要殖民月球的想法一样荒谬。共和党不能支持某些人提出的极端立场，阿金必须马上离开，他必须现在就走。
foreignization: 我理解其他人有不同的观点。堕胎是一个艰难的话题。强奸不应是这样。而作为政治问题，这是一个不需要思考的问题。阿金的粉丝们对自己的立场充满激情，但他们必须意识到这是一个只有20%的全国人民共享的立场。这是罗恩·保罗的领地。这和新特想要殖民月球一样。共和党不能支持某人持有的每个极端立场。阿金必须离开，而且必须立即离开。
